frase_original: He kissed her softly. "I think we both need time to get to know one another before we make love again. I don't want to rush things.""But mating us so we're connected for all eternity isn't rushing things?

texto: You scared the life out of me.""Good thing cats have nine lives, then," she teased.
explicacao: Citação de Carrie Ann Ryan sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “You scared the life out of me.""Good thing cats have nine lives, then," she teased.” articula amor, lion-shifter, paranormal-romance em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como paranormal-romance e phoenix.
